value: I'm sorry you're experiencing these issues with your iPhone 7 Plus—I understand how frustrating that must be. We'd like to help get this sorted out for you. A few quick questions to narrow things down: When did you install the update, and have you tried restarting your phone or checking if there's available storage space? Also, regarding the charging time, are you using the original charger or a different one? Let me know these details and we'll work toward a solution.
